events.title: 🎨 This Side of Crazy
events.location: The Beall Theatre at Theatre Alliance - 651 Pilot View St NW Winston Salem, NC 27101
events.description:
“This Side of Crazy,” by Del Shores, is next in Theatre Alliance’s Beall Theatre! When three feuding sisters are summoned home by their popular gospel-music composing mother to perform one final musical concert, old tensions flare, and the outcome is anything but blessed and holy! Grab a front-row seat to the latest by the southern writer who brought us “Sordid Lives,” “Southern Baptist Sissies,” and “The Trials and Tribulations of a Trailer Trash Housewife!”

September 12 and 27 at 12 PM and 3 PM

Tickets: $15

Get them here: https://theatrealliance.ws/box-office/

Rated R for language, sexual content, mature subject matter

LOCATION: The Beall Theatre at Theatre Alliance - 651 Pilot View St NW Winston Salem, NC 27101

Signature Drink: The Sandi Patti

Running Time: 2 hours, with one 15-minute Intermission

(same physical building as Ihrie Theatre, but the entrance is on Pilot Street- free parking in the upper lot adjacent to the building)

Starring, left to right: Cory Blalock, Leanna Daley, Katy Carroll, Becki West

events.title: 🎨 The Prince of Egypt
events.location: Winston-Salem Theatre Alliance, Jamie Lawson Auditorium, 650 West 6th St, Winston-Salem, NC
events.description:
“The Prince of Egypt” plays today at 7:30 PM at Sunday at 2 PM!

Immerse yourself in this family-friendly, Biblical epic about Moses’ quest to deliver his people. Don’t miss it!

🎶 With a sweeping score by legendary composer Stephen Schwartz—the genius behind Wicked, Pippin, and Godspell—The Prince of Egypt transforms the story of Moses into an unforgettable theatrical experience.

From the palaces of Pharaohs to the parting of the Red Sea, this epic musical is powered by music that moves both heart and soul.

🎭 The Prince of Egypt storms the stage this summer at Theatre Alliance!

📅 August 8–17, 2025

🎟️ Tickets: $25 Adults | $23 Students, Seniors & Military  Get tickets here: https://theatrealliance.ws/box-office/

📍 Winston-Salem Theatre Alliance, Jamie Lawson Auditorium, 650 West 6th St, Winston-Salem, NC —Free parking onsite!

🔖 Rated PG – perfect for families and fans of epic storytelling

Signature Drink: Red Sea 

Season Sponsors: Lewis & Keller Attorneys, YES! Weekly

Photos: Neil Jester - Fine Art Photography

#PrinceOfEgypt #StephenSchwartz #EpicMusicals #BroadwayLegend #wstheatrealliance

events.title: 🛍️ WVM 2 Year Celebration
events.location: 486 N Patterson Ave, Winston Salem, NC - Incendiary Brewing at Bailey Park
events.description:
Come out and celebrate 2 years of WVM!
Tomorrow Saturday April 4th from 12-5pm

📍486 N Patterson Ave, Winston Salem, NC
Incendiary Brewing at Bailey Park

💙Tips and Information:

•We have 25+ vintage clothing and accessories vendors !
Jewelry by honestjewelers 

•Our vendors will have all sorts of styles and price points. You will find anything from a $10 rack to premium vintage goods!

•We are giving away new WVM totes to the first 50 customers!

⭐️Have you shopped with us before? If not here are some tips:

1) Each booth is its own separate entity. Make sure to check out with that vendor before walking away

2) Bring a reusable bag to carry your purchases. Our goal is to limit waste.

3) Shop early and don’t hesitate! Vintage items are typically 1 of 1. It is more than likely you will never see that item again!

4) Vendors accept Venmo, Zelle, Cashapp, Cash, and/or Tap to Pay
  Each vendor is different so make sure to ask what form is best. Cash makes things easier !

That’s pretty much it! I hope this helps in planning your trip tomorrow! There are tons of food options and coffee in the area! 

We will see you there!

events.title: 🛍️ Outdoor Pop Up Market
events.description:
2 weeks away from our next outdoor pop up market!

Catch us on Saturday March 14th from 11-5pm !
There will be 20+ vintage clothing and accessory vendors, 
Drinks by _matchamamas , and food by latingrillonwheels 

Event details:
📍 675 W 5th St, Winston-Salem, NC
🎟️ Free admission Free parking
📅 Saturday March 14th, 11-5pm

Check out the link in our Bio! We have free stickers !

This is a 1 day only event! 
Cook up and outfit, bring a friend, and we’ll see you in 2 weeks✌️

What is WVM:
We are a monthly vintage and secondhand clothing market. Our vendors curate tons of secondhand items every month; items like carhartt and nascar jackets, coach purses, belts, jewelry, shoes, decor, and so much more. 
Our goal is to bring new people into the secondhand world! By doing so we save tons of articles from textile/land waste which in turn helps our environment! 

We can’t wait to see you!

events.description:
JUST DROPPED — TICKETS ON SALE NOW!  Boots on the Ground Music Festival is taking over ROAR during Black Theater Festival week, and it’s about to be three nights of pure vibe.

🎤 Thu, July 30 – 9:30 PM: Poetic Justice RnB bringing the smooth, sexy soul.
🎸 Fri, July 31 – 9:30 PM: Moxie lighting up the night with old‑school R&B + Funk.
✨ Sat, Aug 1 – 9:30 PM: Envision delivering a powerhouse mix of R&B, Motown, Pop & Dance.

Sip from the largest beer wall in the Triad, hit one of our three full bars, and soak in the luxury atmosphere all night long!

Early Bird 3‑Day Passes are LIVE so grab yours before they disappear: 
https://www.roarws.com/event-details/boots-on-the-ground-festival-package

events.title: 🎵 DJ Professor
events.description:
ROAR IS BRINGING THE HEAT THIS WEEKEND! 🔥 Friday night, DJ Professor takes over and he's serving up ALL your favorite classic funk jams so get ready to move! 

Then Saturday? We're doubling down. He's back with the smoothest old school Motown grooves PLUS — we're making history with our FIRST EVER Bull City Cider Fest! 🍎🥂 9 incredible cider flavors hitting the floor, including 3 cider martinis you do NOT want to miss!

🎟️ Grab your Early Bird Drink Tickets NOW: ✅ 2 for $5 ✅ 4 for $10 -> https://www.roarws.com/event-details/bull-city-cider-festival

Don't sleep on this one! It's gonna be a weekend to remember! See you at ROAR!

events.title: 🎵 BACK IN THE DAY
events.description: ⏪✨ Old school hits. Rooftop vibes. DJ Professor on the decks. Tonight we go BACK IN THE DAY on the Roar Rooftop — 7PM til late! Great food, great drinks, even greater music! Come through!

events.title: 🎵 DJ Professor at Roar
events.description:
Warm nights, rooftop views, and DJ Professor on the ones and twos! This weekend at Roar is everything! Come kick it with us from 7PM til late, no cover charge, just cold drinks, great food, and good people! 🍹🕺☀️ 

📸 Photo: Bud Royster

events.description: WEEKEND PLANS ⁉️ Make plans to be at ROAR 🦁

events.title: 🎵 Pirates of the Caribbean Rum Festival - Roar & Miller's
events.description:
Ahoy, ye landlubbers! 🏴‍☠️ The seas are calling and we want YOU on deck! Set sail for the PIRATES OF THE CARIBBEAN RUM FESTIVAL on Saturday, June 20th at Roar and Miller's on Trade  a swashbuckling, rum-soaked adventure you will NOT want to miss! 

Choose from 12 legendary rum cocktails crafted for the boldest of buccaneers:

🏴‍☠️ Dead Man's Chest 🦑 The Kraken's Ink 🧜 Siren's Song 🔥 Blackbeard's Delight ⚓ Davy Jones' Locker 🌴 Port Royal Punch 💀 The Jolly Roger 🌊 Calypso's Curse 🥭 Shipwrecked Mango Mojito 🗺️ Treasure Map Martini 🍺 Buccaneer's Brew 🪵 Walk the Plank

Your treasure awaits,tickets are just $12 for 2 drinks or $20 for 4 drinks, redeemable at Roar OR Miller's on Trade. Tickets include 20% gratuity.

Choose your adventure: ⚔️ Roar & Miller's  12PM to 7PM or Roar Rooftop Party 8PM to 11PM

Grab your crew, grab your tickets, and prepare to set sail. The rum festival waits for no one! 🍹🏴‍☠️

Snag your tickets here and claim your bounty: https://www.roarws.com/event-details/pirates-of-the-caribbean-rum-festival

events.description: TOMORROW! Memorial Mimosa Fest kicks off. 🥂 12+ flavors. Good vibes. Even better company. 🍓 Strawberry. 🍍 Pineapple. 🍑 Peach. 🍉 Watermelon. Come thirsty. events.title: 🎵 LOVE IN THE CLUB
events.description:
💖 JUST ANNOUNCED & ON SALE NOW! 💖LOVE IN THE CLUB is coming to ROAR on Friday, June 19 and we are taking you BACK. 🔥The 2000s never ended and we just turned the volume ALL THE WAY UP. 🎶

Usher. Missy Elliott. Rihanna. Snoop Dogg. Akon. And SO much more. Every song that raised you, shaped you, and had you thinking you were THAT girl / THAT guy on the dance floor. 

This is your night. This is OUR house. And it's about to be the most fun you've had all summer.

💖 2000s R&B & Hip Hop 
🕗 Friday, June 19 
📍 ROAR 
🎫 Tickets on sale NOW — grab them before they're gone! 👇 🔗 https://www.roarws.com/event-details/love-in-the-club

Tag who you're bringing to the function! 👇💖🔥

events.title: 🎵 SERIAL KILLER WEEKEND at ROAR
events.description:
IT STARTS TONIGHT. SERIAL KILLER WEEKEND is HERE at ROAR and it's not for the faint of heart. 🔪 Four infamous killers. Four chilling stories. One immersive live experience that'll make your favorite true-crime podcast feel like a bedtime story. Think premium cocktails, a deeply ominous atmosphere, and a KILLER twist you won't see coming.

👀 And when the show ends? The night doesn't. 🍹 ROOFTOP AFTER PARTY. Need we say more?

🎟️ Grab your tix before they're gone → https://feverup.com/m/619469

events.title: 🎵 Mimosa Festival
events.location: Roar & Miller's on Trade in Downtown Winston-Salem
events.description:
You asked for one day. We gave you two. Now we're giving you THREE because that's just the kind of weekend this is. The Mimosa Festival is taking over ALL WEEKEND at Roar & Miller's on Trade in Downtown Winston-Salem, and the lineup is stacked with12+ flavors including strawberry, pineapple, peach, watermelon, and more waiting to be sipped.

Come thirsty. Come hungry. Come with your whole crew. 🥂🔥

This is not a drill — tag who needs to be there and grab your tickets before they're gone.

TIX & INFO 🎟 www.roarws.com

events.title: 🎵 RAP DRAKE vs R&B DRAKE Battle
events.description:
poeticrnb WINSTON-SALEM… tonight might really be one of them ones 😭🔥

Drake dropped THREE new albums and now the timing for this battle just got even crazier.

So not only are we going round for round with RAP DRAKE vs R&B DRAKE… we listening to the new albums together too 😮‍💨

Everyone has opinions when it comes to Drake’s catalog and tonight we’re finally outside debating it properly.

Defending champ djlilvegas vs djnikkithekee 
9PM at roar.ws 

Hosted by poeticlee 

Tickets on poeticrnb.com

events.title: 🌈 K for Kids Alphabet Movie Night: Into the Spiderverse
events.location: lGBTQ Center of Durham Warehouse on Hunt
events.description:
ABCDEFGHIJ “K” for Kids this Alphabet Movie Night we will be gathering at the lGBTQ Center of Durham Warehouse on Hunt for a Kid & Family Film. We will be watching the Marvel animated feature “Into the Spiderverse!” This Saturday the 30th of May at 6:30pm we will all be friendly neighborhood SpiderFans!

We will have seats and popcorn a plenty, but please bring a blanket or pillow if you are a floor person. Also Pajamas and Stuffies always welcome, so you can make the transition from the movie to the bed that much easier!

Hope to see yall soon!

*Note: this movie , and our subsequent feature, were selected by audience members whom attended the last feature! So please join us and help us select the films you'd like to see.

#family #lgbtq #queer #kidsmovie #familyfun #community #pajamaparty #popcorn

events.title: 🌈 Get Shit Done
events.description:
Some of the biggest barriers to survivor safety are finance related. While we do our best to put cash directly into survivors hands, in tandem, we thought it would be awesome to create a body doubling/coworking space where we can help each other executive function. As well as offer relevant financial resources! That’s why we are launching “Get Shit Done” evenings. They will occur biweekly and be available in person or online (email advocate@lgbtqcenterofdurham.org for the virtual link). If you or someone you know is a money expert who wants to share their knowledge with queer/trans survivors, please reach out!

Image Descriptions/Alt Text:
Slide 1: Background is a wood grain table but in a lavender and dark purple hue. On top of the table, acting as the base of the image, is an open spiral notebook. The metal spirals are gold and the paper is white and lined. There is a faded coffee mug ring on the paper. In the top right corner of the image is a crumbled up piece of paper. On the right side of the image is a black pen. At the bottom right corner of the image is a folded set of marble colored glasses. On the spiral notebook in a black pen-like handwriting font that reads ““Get Shit Done, Every Other Tuesday”. Below that reads “(bolded) 5:30-7p, 114 Hunt St” all highlighted in purple. Below that it reads, “In person & Virtual Options“ (underlined)” With purple and pink stars on the right of it. Below that reads “A virtual space to do the $$ things we’ve all been avoiding. Come work on taxes, budgeting, filling out that form... whatever you need!” At the bottom of the notebook page is the SQSN mushroom logo and Southern Queer Survivor Network in all purple bold+caps font.

 #survivors #lgbtq #durhamnc #economicjustice #queer #trans

events.title: 🌈 Monthly POC Trans Support Group
events.description: If you're a person of color Trans or gender nonconforming community member, join us for our Monthly POC Trans Support Group to discuss your trans experience and normalized joy in your life. The support group meets the last Wednesday of each month from 5 to 7 PM.

events.title: 🌈 Welcome in Wednesday: Show and Tell Talent Show
events.location: LGBTQ Center of Durham, 114 Hunt St, Durham
events.description:
Put Some Play in your Day!

Welcome in Wednesday with Stormie Daie, meetups for youth 5-12, and families held at the LGBTQ Center of Durham at 114 Hunt St and participating community spaces.  This is your chance to engage the children in the LGBTQ Durham community by sharing space and activities together. Welcome in Wednesday will prioritize fun through social gathering and activities emphasizing nature, science, sharing, education, reading, and hands on crafts.

This time will serve to create connections amongst youth and families and strengthen community ties with and amongst younger lgbtq folks and their families.

As well we will inform the children and families with the happenings of the LGBTQ Center through partnerships with likeminded groups and community partners.

For questions, concerns, registration or interest in sponsoring/supporting Welcome in Wednesday, contact Stormie Daie at sdaie@lgbtqcenterofdurham.org

4/15 -  Flower Pressing/Pet Rock
4/22 -  Terrarium
4/29 - Tea Party
5/6 - Kiteing
5/13 - Face Paint
5/20 - Dress Up Tea Party
5/22 - Show and Tell Talent Show

*activities are subject to change due to weather and space/supply needs

This is not child care, parents or guardians or care takers are expected to be present.

events.title: 🌈 Alphabet Movie Nite: Space Jam
events.description:
Let's get reeling and rolling for our first “Alphabet Movie Nite” here at the Queerhouse Theater. This first screening is “K” for the Kids with all ages welcome! 

We will be watching the 90s multimedia sports comedy animated classic “Space Jam,” starring NC’s very own, plus all your favorite cartoon athletes - and hosted by Durham's own, Stormie Daie! 

Screening is at May 9 at 6:30pm with a runtime of 1:30min. Space is ample but seating is limited so please bring a blanket or lawn chair if possible. 

Also feel free to bring your best stuffie and wear your best pjs so you can crawl home and get in bed promptly after the finish of the film! 

Popcorn provided. Feel free to bring outside meals/snacks for you and yours.

Come early - parking is limited, primarily street parking.

events.title: 🌈 Black Trans Short Film Festival
events.description:
We’re proud to partner with Comfrey Films for the Black Trans Short Film Festival—an inspiring celebration of bold, culture-shifting films by Black trans, gender non-conforming, and intersex filmmakers.
Register for free to join us at the Black Trans Short Film Festival in Durham, NC April 30-May 2nd. comfreyfilms.org/festival 

Can’t make it to Durham this month? Get your ticket to BTSFF virtual! 
This year’s theme, “We are free now,” centers storytelling that does not ask for permission—stories that are shaping culture, building community, and imagining new possibilities for the future.
The Black Trans Short Film Festival features a dynamic lineup of film screenings, filmmaker conversations, and community events that celebrate emerging and established voices in Black trans media.
Join us in supporting these incredible artists and experiencing the power of their work.
🎬 Learn more and get tickets: comfreyfilms.org/festival
We hope to see you there!

events.title: 🤝 Get Out of My Dreams Pride Edition
events.description:
So remember when Arcana turned TEN in December, and Erin threw the dance party of her dreams with four of her favorite DJs? Well this is a party that just won’t stop- we did it again in March, and now we’re BACK for our June Pride edition with Fifi Hifi and VSPRTN. Get Out of My Dreams, get into my car, and let’s road trip through time together! A  four hour dance party replete with all the sapphic longing and yearning and fantasizing we can fit into one night. Big sapphic dance hits, divas, and whatever else Fifi and Ves are feeling for this very special Pride party. Robyn, Prince, Florence, Whitney, Kylie, Prince, Janelle Monae, FKA Twigs, Gaga, Sia, Charli, and beyond.

Last December and March this party was in full swing by 10pm, so do arrive early!

This show will sell out! Get your $10 tickets in advance- link in bio.

 21+ with proper ID

events.title: 🤝 Evening of Ambient Performances
events.description:
THIS FRIDAY 🥵 join us for an evening of ambient performances at this low-key, sexy salon. IT'S PRIDE ✨ so come see these performers move with lots of exactly THAT🌈

🎶lepayne3 Sweet 'N Lo will be singing two cabaret songs to soothe you with

❤️‍🔥_kaiology will be bringing some sultry energy with drag (psssst you remember this epic winner from the queer talent show 🏆)

 🫦summerflingsburlesque will be making you swooooon with her burlesque act (another qts winner 🏆 and amazing performer)

😉dizquefresa Whitney (La TUYA) will be setting the scene in between with some music for your ears only 🫶💋

$5-10 sliding scale
21+

events.title: 🤝 Monthly Bachata and Dance Social
events.description:
the first week of june🌈 

we have a cuuuute week lined up for you!

First we have our monthly bachata and dance social🌞 free class!! but grab a drink and tip your instructors before taking your new moves to the dance floor🪩

Wednesday is the monthly triangleareapaganalliance meet & greet! come mingle with other local pagans! 

Thursday we have lowolfmusic 🎶 they’re a queer folk country artist from Asheville with a unique and rebellious energy ✨

Friday we have the sexiest, sultriest Marmalade ever💋 come see some exciting sexy performances with a dj set by dizquefresa in between🎶❤️‍🔥

on Saturday we have some nice ambient vibes with Queen Plz! come hang with your friends and enjoy a nice, cute night out! 

then Sunday we have some good live music with Brianna McGeehan and Ashley Virginia!!! 🪩✨🎶💋

events.title: 🤝 DND Campaigns
events.description:
so it’s the end of May? 

was it not just April? I just, okay whatever

to close out the month we have some friends joining us 😇 

a few DND campaigns are happening tomorrow night, dm begayfightdragons for info on how to sign up! 🐉

Figure drawing is happening at 8pm Wednesday. totally free BUT please tip your model!! 🎨🖌️

THEE third annual Dyke Night Pride PreGa(y)me is this Thursday with one of our FAAAAVE DJs, djtausi 💋✨

Then live music all weekend long: our friends daniel_delorenzo trio, Kurt Stacener, and Jamie Anderson will be here to close out May before June comes in with a BANG (more deets soon😇)

events.title: 🤝 Arcana Pride Party
events.description: It’s almoooooost time! Arcana loves to start early to kickoff our favorite time of the year— PRIDE 🏳️‍🌈🏳️‍⚧️ we can’t wait to see you for one of our SEXIEST 💦 parties of the year.. whewwww the things we’ve seen 👀 and the things we’d like to see again….. 👀👏👏👏 DJ Tausi will be holding it down for us from 830-1130pm. Thursday 5/28 🎀 21+ to play! $5 cover after low sensory hour.

events.title: 🤝 The Harlots Burlesque
events.description:
so nice you had to see it twice! 

theharlotsburlesque is back tomorrow and Wednesday! it’s
SOLD OUT! NO tickets will be available at the door!

Thursday we have our almost monthly (sometimes every other month) book & plant swap FEATURING Irbprovisions sandwich pop up

then music all weekend long! come listen to some good ole fashion jazz!

events.title: 🤝 Book & Plant Swap with Irbprovisions Sandwich Pop-up
events.description:

events.description:
she’s baaacckkk 💋

our annual Dyke Night Pride Pre Ga(y)me is BACK for it’s third year!!! 🥳✂️🩷

come out and party with us and the always gorgeous djtausi!!! 

low-sensory hours from 6-8:30 for the queers who wanna mingle and party without the dancing crowds. we’ll be playing some sweet chill music for you to kiss and sip to🥂

AS ALWAYS,,, we’ll be curating an exclusive one night only special dyke night drink menu (plus mocktails) 🍸🥂🥃 

$5 cover starting at 8:30
21+ 
6pm-12am

events.title: 🤝 Craft Night: Mending Projects
events.description:
TOMORROW! 🪡

River Takada (rivtak) (she/they) will be walking around helping trouble shoot your mending projects, and words of encouragement and tops of how to practically mend your texts. 

At 7:15 they’ll be doing a beginner hand sewing demo! 

Needles, thread, random fabric scraps, and scissors will be provided.

Bring 1-2 textile (clothing, bag, patching) mending projects you would like to ask questions about and get started on! 

NO hemming and alteration projects please! 

BYO zippers, buttons, matching thread or fabric for patching, etc. 

It’s still craft night, so other craft projects are welcome to come and mingle with the sewing! 

(Free event but tips for River are always welcome!)💸

events.title: 🤝 Forever Barbara screening
events.location: Full Frame Documentary Film Festival, Durham
events.description:
Arcana is proud sponsors of the Full Frame Documentary Film Festival happening this weekend in Durham!! 

There are some great documentaries happening this weekend, but we’re especially excited for Friday’s screening of Forever Barbara: 

Feminist icon and lesbian filmmaker Barbara Hammer’s life mission was to create and record lesbian histories, both personal and societal. With Hammer’s own voice as our guide, Barbara Forever weaves elements from her personal archive—films, home movies, photos, audio recordings—and interviews with her longtime partner, Florrie Burke, to create an expansive portrait of its subject. 

playing at 7:30! tickets at fullframefest !!! 

Stop in before or after the screening for a springtime cocktail! If you pop in after, you might catch Ally J and Kevin Clark’s set!!

events.title: 🤝 Meka La Crème's Birthday Celebration
events.description:
Making friends as an adult feels like a herculean task, so we’ve made it easy with mannny fun events this week to come mingle with other durham queers! 

Tomorrow we have our in house diva, meka_la_creme’s birthday celebration!!!!! Come out and party with some live burlesque performances all in celebration of Meka (NO COVER, bring $$ to tip performers) 

If you wanna mingle some more, we have queer craft night & lesbian poetry club this week on tuesday and sunday respectively!! 

We also have live music this week with many many may long time friends: Emily & Itsi, Ally & Kevin, and Les Trios Chats!!! some folk, acoustic, and live jazz!!! so fun! 

come make new friends, come hang out!!

events.description: This Saturday - GAG RETURNS 🪩 Join the party clubera_bullcity and durhamfruit alongside nightlife icons Amanda Lepore and Susanne Bartsch 💋 This two floor dance party features music by Boyyyish (NYC) Arra (NYC) Steven J (Raleigh) and Sypha (Durham)! Hosted by Naomi Dix and Trey Roberts | Tickets can be found at durhamfruit.com

Tickets can be found at Legends instagram or at legends-club.com 🪩 She’ll be performing alongside thechloecassidy itschantecassidy Giselle Cassidy Carter and Paris Brooks Bonet 💃

events.description: Feeling the cabin fever? This Thursday come join the girls at the Underground — featuring our favorite Oak City Kitty thechloecassidy, nicktoday_aidatomorrow and mizmarshamellows

events.title: 🌈 TRAMP Dance Party Launch
events.description:
GAG! is launching a dance party on January 9th! TRAMP was created in response to the community for a dance party — a raw, no disruptions, nonstop music dance party where you can dance freely. Once Bitter Social opened, a new downtown bar by the makers of Bitter Sweet and Johnson Street Yacht Club, it became clear this space was made for just that!

This small intimate space creates a different vibe from any GAG party that promotes getting closer with each other; whether it’s dancing or conversing in one their dark corners.
GAG is bringing two special guest DJs, featuring, Pisces Prince (Gaven Simon) from NYC — featured in So.Gay in 2025 and GHO3 SPINZ from GAG to Death this past Halloween, will pump up the BPMs FOR EVERYONE tramping on the dance floor!

Not only is it a premiere of a new party — but it serves as a birthday celebration of GAG producer, Trey Roberts!

events.title: 🌈 GAG Halloween Warehouse Party
events.location: Durham Fruit & Club Era Bull City
events.description: GAG has announced the return of their 3 room warehouse party for Halloween. October 31st — gag_raleigh takes over durhamfruit and clubera_bullcity for a queer dance party you won’t forget. Starring Armana Khan, Vice, Daniel and Julie J — all coming from NYC! Tickets at durhamfruit.com

events.title: 🌈 Stranger Brother
events.description: This Saturday catch “Stranger Brother” - an indigenous short film that follows Adam, a queer indigenous man whose world is shaken when his younger brother unexpectedly arrives. You can check it out as part of the sundanceorg indigenous film tour that’s part of the triangle_native Film Festival at the Rialto

events.title: 🌈 HIV/STI Testing w/ Alliance
events.description:
This Week @ The Center!

Sunday, 06/07: No Events or Programs

Monday, 06/08: HIV/STI Testing w/ Alliance @ Center, 5-7 PM + 
Transgender Discussion Group @ Center, 7-8 PM 

Tuesday, 06/09: No Events or Programs

Wednesday, 06/10: Youth Coffee House - Raleigh @ 
Blackbird Books and Coffee 5-7 PM 

Thursday, 06/11: Older Adults Coffee Gathering @ Center, 9:30 AM + 
Queer Professional Happy Hour @ Bittersocial 6-8 PM 

Friday, 06/12: Game Night! @ Center, 6 - 9 PM + 
LGBTQ+ Game Night @ Sidequest 6PM + Heated Rivalry Dance Party 
@ Pourhouse 9 PM - 12 AM

Saturday, 06/13: Homebody Yoga @ Slow Power Yoga 12-1 PM + Pride Market @ The Hartwell 12-4 PM + Mrs. Romper Romp BDay Bash @ Le Dive 1 PM - Until +
Alphabet Soup Market @ Downtown Cary Park 5-10 PM + Triangle Queer Artist Collective @ The Center, 6 - 8 PM 

Sunday, 6/14:  Pride Service @ UUFR 10:30 AM + Queens Supporting Queens @ Le Dive 12 - 2 PM + Pop Up For Pride Market @ Gateway Plaza 12-3 PM + Pride Fest  @ Pickleback 12:30 - 8 PM 

Keep an eye on our calendar for drop-in times and program changes!

Interested in volunteering at this years Out! Raleigh Pride? Applications are now open and can be found using the link here: https://www.lgbtcenterofraleigh.com/volunteer-orp

#Pride2026 #RaleighPride #OutRaleighPride #RallyRaleigh #ORP2026

events.title: 🌈 Juneteenth Wellness & Community Evening
events.description: Join us on June 18th from 6:30 - 8:30 PM for an evening centered on wellness and community. Together, we will honor Juneteenth by acknowledging the past, embracing the present, and investing in our collective well-being for a better future!  More details to come! In the meantime use the link in our bio to secure your spot ✨

events.title: 🌈 Out! Raleigh Pride - Speed Dating & Screening of 'It's Not You. It's Me: Chicago!'
events.description:
🎥 Celebrate Pride with connection and community!

Join Out! Raleigh Pride and the LGBT Center of Raleigh for a night of speed dating, speed friending, or just connecting.. followed by the Raleigh premiere screening of It's Not You. It's Me: Chicago!

This award-winning queer dating and mental health docuseries is making international waves and now it’s coming to Raleigh for one night only! Bring your boo, your bestie, or both! You don't want to miss this! Proceeds support the completion of the series and continued services at the Center 🩷 . Grab your ticket using the link in our bio! 

*speed dating/friending not required!

events.title: 🌈 Pride Month First Friday Health Event
events.description:
Pride month is in full swing and we're kicking it off with a health-based First Friday event with your faves f.o.f.wrld the_aasc its.melodyrose and ViiV! We'll have free STI/HIV testing with Alliance, trivia hosted by Melody Rose, health-based giveaways, and small bites from Da Bubz/Le Dive. 💫

No RSVP required, just drop in when you can! Come by 8pm to join trivia, we'll have a prize for the winning team 🌈

🗓 Friday, June 5th from 7-10pm
📍 LGBT Center of Raleigh (128 E Cabarrus Street)

events.title: 🌈 ASPYRE Youth Leadership Camp Registration Opens
events.description:
🚨 The countdown is on! 🚨

Registration for ASPYRE Youth Leadership Camp opens TOMORROW, June 1!

ASPYRE Youth Leadership Camp empowers young members of the LGBTQ+ community and their allies to achieve personal growth through activism and community engagement. Camp ASPYRE provides our youth an opportunity to discover their authentic voices while strengthening their leadership and advocacy skills.. all while connecting with other passionate young people who are also ready to create change.

Open to youth ages 13 to 18 who are currently enrolled in high school.

Mark your calendars and spread the word!

Registration opens tomorrow, June 1! 🌈✨ Keep an eye out for links and additional information

Questions? Contact aspyre@lgbtcenterofraleigh.com.

events.title: 🌈 Raleigh Premiere Screening: It's Not You. It's Me: Chicago!
events.description:
🎬 Are you single, ready to mingle, and working to heal? Kick off your 2026 Pride Weekend in the Triangle with an exclusive screening of the new award-winning relationship, dating, and mental health docuseries that's creating international buzz!

Hosted by Out! Raleigh Pride and the LGBT Center of Raleigh, join us for an evening of singly mingling, intimate viewing, insightful conversation, and colorful celebrations for the Raleigh premiere screening of "It's Not You. It's Me: Chicago!"

This award-winning queer dating and mental health docuseries is making international waves and now it’s coming to Raleigh for one night only! Bring your boo, your bestie, or both! You don't want to miss this!

Proceeds support the completion of the series and continued services at the Center ❤️. Grab your ticket using the link in our bio!

The beloved Rory will be in the building as well bringing all the swag and good energy. Bring the family and let's cheer for our team together!

#NCCourage #NCWomensSoccer

events.title: 🤝 The Wiley Fosters Last Show at Mystery Brewing Company
events.description:
Today, we’re sharing sad news. After almost seven years, Mystery Brewing Company will be closing its doors at the end of the day on October 31st.
.
.
This has been an incredibly difficult decision. We’ve always been undercapitalized, and it’s been a struggle to operate for some time now. We’ve suffered a string of pretty bad luck over the past couple of years: equipment failures, construction and permitting delays, storm-related outages and losses. The end result is that we can no longer afford to operate.
.
.
Over the course of the next week, we’ll be doing the best we can to celebrate everything we love about Mystery to give it a fond farewell, releasing some favorite old beers that we’ve had kicking around in the back of the cooler, and trying to say goodbye the best way we can. If you get a chance, please come and visit us, say hi, and enjoy a pint, a meal, or a night of music for the last time. The Wiley Fosters – our amazing house band – will be playing our last show at the pub on the evening of October 27th.
.
.
We’re enormously proud of the community that has grown up around Mystery, and we’ll miss being here every day for Hillsborough.
.
.
With one last raised glass,
.
.
Erik Lars Myers
Founder, Brewer, CEO
Mystery Brewing Company

events.title: 🤝 Live music by writeplayrepeat
events.description: It’s a soup & sandwich kind of day. Head to the Pub for our Short Rib & Pumpkin Cassoulet with white beans, tomatoes, herbs, and leeks. We also have five sandwiches on the October menu including the Edamame Pate with local sprouts, cucumbers, roasted peppers, arugula, and herb aioli on sourdough. We had to postpone the savinggracenc adoption event due to weather, but the Pub is still open all day! Live music from writeplayrepeat tonight at 8:30 PM! See you in #HillsboroughNC.

events.title: 🤝 savinggracenc at the Pub
events.description: **THIS EVENT HAS BEEN POSTPONED DUE TO WEATHER!** We’re hosting savinggracenc on the back patio at the Pub on Saturday! Come enjoy a pint and meet sweet pups!

events.title: 🤝 Free Live Music
events.description: Y’all. This patio weather is precious. Don’t waste it. Free, live music at 8:30 PM tonight & tomorrow. Two new beers on tap tomorrow: Fast As You Can, Gingerbread Porter and Rosalind, our Fall Saison! Delicious food all weekend! Come on over to Hillsborough! #ncbeer

events.description: On October’s menu: Mystery Hot Brown with turkey, bacon, roasted tomato, beer cheese & a soft fried farm egg. All Mystery beers are $1-off on Tuesdays so head to the Pub! 📸: chrisubik

events.title: 🤝 Beer Church: Mini Oktoberfest Celebration
events.description: Today’s #BeerChurch is a mini Oktoberfest celebration! We’re tapping four Oktoberfest beers: 1) Rapunzel, Oktoberfest Ale, mysterybrewing 2) Oktrophyfest, Märzen Lager, trophybrewing 3) Oktoberfest, Märzen Lager, carolinabrewingcompany 4) Oktoberfest, Märzen Lager, portcitybrew. All on tap starting at 11:30 AM! #ncbeer #vabeer #oktoberfest

events.title: 🤝 Love Chapel Hill Bracket Challenge Deadline
events.description:
For all those adding "a perfect tournament bracket" to their prayer requests... 🏀👀

Join the Love Chapel Hill Bracket Challenge and fill out brackets for both the Men’s and Women’s NCAA tournaments for a chance to win prizes! Brackets must be completed by Thursday at noon. 

Links to both challenges are on our stories! (or DM us) Password for both is "LOVE"

events.title: 🤝 Community Lunch
events.description:
Join us this Sunday after our 11:15 service for a Community Lunch!🍴🩵

We're excited to host this special gathering every third Sunday at the Foundry, where we can come together in fellowship. All are welcome and we can't wait to share this moment with you!

events.title: 🤝 Church Service
events.description:
Yes, we lose an hour of sleep this weekend... but don’t worry, church is still at 11:15 a.m.!

That means there’s plenty of time to:
😴 sleep in a little
☕ grab coffee
🏀 celebrate a basketball win 👀

Whatever your Sunday morning looks like, we’ll be here ready to welcome you at 11:15 a.m.!

events.title: 🤝 Sunday Service
events.description:
Church isn’t a building, it’s the people! And we always have space for you 🩵
Join us on a Sundays at 11:15 a.m. or throughout the week at our discipleship courses and events! 
#chapelhillchurch #nchurch #northcarolina #chapelhill #churchtiktok

events.title: 🤝 Worship Night
events.description:
YOU'RE INVITED for a night of fellowship and lifting our voices in praise together! Join us for Worship Night this Sunday, March 1 at 6 p.m. at The Foundry (7326 Sunrise Road)! 

We’ll gather for a focused time of worship, inspiration, and intentional prayer for our nation and our local communities. This special night of worship is in partnership with the NC East District of the Wesleyan Church! We’re honored to host at The Foundry, with worship led by the Love Chapel Hill Worship Team.

events.title: 🤝 An Unlikely Lent: Extraordinary People of the Easter Story
events.description:
Whether you’ve observed Lent for years or you still have questions about what it even is, we invite you to join us and learn together!

We’re intentionally journeying through Lent in our next discipleship course, An Unlikely Lent: Extraordinary People of the Easter Story, starting TONIGHT, Feb. 24 at 7 p.m. Together, we’ll explore the surprising, ordinary, and unlikely people woven into the Easter story and what we can learn from each of them. 

📆 Tuesdays at 7 p.m. at The Foundry

Bring your curiosity, your experiences, and your questions!

events.title: 🤝 First Sunday Worship Service at The Foundry
events.description:
How we feel knowing TOMORROW is our first Sunday at The Foundry (7326 Sunrise Road)! You're invited to join us at 11:15 a.m. for our worship service and then for lunch on us after! 

We're excited for everyone to see our new home base! 

#chapelhillchurch #ncchurch #churchfamily #chapelhillnc #chapelhill

events.title: 🤝 Social Saturday with downtownhighpointnc
events.description:
The best way to experience summer in High Point is through weekend events! From live music, heritage trail tours, to specialty-priced mimosas, there’s always something happening in our city.🎤🍻

We’re sharing just a few of the things going on, but if you want to see more, comment “CAL” for the direct link to our Events Calendar. It’s constantly updated with what’s happening so you never miss a beat!

Take a look at what’s going on this weekend↙️

Saturday, June 6th | 12pm | Social Saturday with downtownhighpointnc 

Saturday, June 6th | 4pm - 7pm | cohab.space sessions open house & live music 

Saturday, June 6th | divebarhighpoint move night | Family-Friendly Movie starts at 6pm | 21+ Movie at 8pm

Sunday, June 7th | 3:30pm | highpointrockers game 

#visithp #visithighpoint #highpointnc

events.title: 🤝 2026 Miss NC Corg Competition
events.description:
We’re thrilled to be hosting the 2026 missncorg competition again here in 📍High Point!

The competition will be held at the hptheatre , with a welcome celebration at stockandgrain during the week of June 22–27. We’re excited to welcome all contestants, sponsors, and families to High Point.

Stay tuned for more exciting updates as competition week approaches!🌆

#visithp #visithighpoint

events.title: 🤝 Kersey Valley Zipline
events.description:
Now’s your sign to get outside and explore and it all starts at kerseyvalley 🪁🌳

Take flight with Kersey Valley’s zipline attraction, an adventure that sends you soaring through the air at heights of up to 58 feet. This activity makes it easy to spend your summer days outdoors while soaking in the thrill of soaring through the air.✈️
Comment “ZIPLINE” for more information on booking your tour.

For ages 10+ | 1-2 hour duration 
📍1615 Kersey Valley Rd 
Archdale, NC 27263

Monday - Thursday & Sunday | 9am - 5pm 
Friday & Saturday | 9am - 9pm 

#visithp #visithighpoint

events.title: 🤝 Social Saturday: Art & Ale
events.description:
Every first Saturday in High Point is a celebration you don’t want to miss!

Head downtown to kickoff the month of June with downtownhighpointnc at Social Saturday❕This month’s theme is Art & Ale!🎨🍻

You’ll get to enjoy stops at local art galleries and shops, including cohab.space , jhadams_cristinagrays , Studio 136, tagarthp at Congdon Yards, and many more! In addition to their regular trolley loop, hop on an extra trolley running 2:00pm–8:00pm to explore all of the art stops. 

Each stop features local artists, activities, and light bites or drinks, so be sure to explore them all!

Kick off your weekend with live music, craft cocktails, food trucks, and a vibrant community vibe. Comment SOCIAL for a direct link to trolley loops, participating art shops, and more! 

#visithp #highpointnc #visithighpoint

events.title: 🤝 2026 rnbsoulpicnic: Family Reunion Edition
events.location: Oak Hollow Festival Park, High Point, NC
events.description:
It’s coming soon and we want to see you there! 🎵🎤

The 2026 rnbsoulpicnic returns for the Family Reunion Edition on Saturday, June 27th, from 2:00pm - 11:00pm.

Enjoy incredible RnB tunes from a variety of artists, delicious soul food, games, and so much more at Oak Hollow Festival Park.🔥

Comment “LINK” if you’re interested in purchasing tickets, getting more information, or checking out the lineup today.
Here’s to cultivating a space where we can reset and recharge together!

Oak Hollow Festival Park | High Point, NC
Saturday, June 27th, 2026 | 2:00pm - 11:00pm 

#visithighpoint #visithp

events.title: 🤝 High Point Rockers Games
events.description:
Last chance to root on your teams this May❕⚾️⚽️

The High Point Rockers and Carolina Core FC are bringing the energy to Truist Point Stadium in downtown High Point to close out the month.

So whether you’ve been meaning to catch your first game, need last-minute plans, or are looking for the perfect long weekend activity… this is your sign.🔥

Comment DOWNTOWN for a full list of things to do when you’re in High Point cheering on our teams!

carolinacorefc | Saturday, May 30 - 6:00pm

events.description:
A guide to outdoor parks in High Point, NC 🛝🌳

We’ve created a guide to help you enjoy more summer days outside whether you’re planning a picnic, getting your steps in, or taking the kids for a walk!🧺

Here’s a list of parks to check out:

events.title: 🤝 High Point Farmers Market
events.location: 901 N. Main St, High Point, NC 27262
events.description:
You know it’s officially summer when…
the High Point Farmers Market is back!🥕🍊💐

Plan your weekend in downtown High Point at highpointpubliclibrary for our Farmers Market, featuring local produce, activities for the kids, local food trucks, and more.

The Farmers Market runs from April 18th - October 31st, every Saturday from 8:30am - 1:00pm.
📌 901 N. Main St, High Point, NC 27262
highpointfarmersmarket 

#visithp #highpointnc #visithighpoint

events.title: 🤝 High Point Rockers Baseball Game
events.description:
Baseball season is here and we’re showing you how to enjoy it to the fullest in High Point!⚾️🍺

Before the game, grab dinner or a quick bite at some of the great spots downtown, including our local food hall stockandgrain 🍴 Choose from their many options including their brand new spot atomicroosterhp or enjoy authentic bbq at b3_smokehouse 

Then head over to cheer on the highpointrockers for a night of baseball, ballpark snacks, and more fun!🏟️🍿

After the game, keep the night going by exploring the nearby bars including foxandrocksnc or revival_hp just steps from the stadium.

From great food to a highpointrockers game and our lively downtown, it’s the perfect way to spend a day in High Point.

Comment ROCKERS and we’ll send you a list of places to eat, drink, and explore before and after the game!

#visithp #highpointnc

events.title: 🤝 High Point City Lake Park Aquatic Center
events.description:
Next month, this Aquatic Center will be open to the public!💧🌤️

The High Point City Lake Park Aquatic Center is the place to be this summer. With a splash pad, lazy river, three slides, and more, it has everything you need for the perfect summer day.

Tickets and season passes for both residents and non-residents can be purchased through the City of High Point Parks & Recreation website. Comment POOL and we’ll send you the direct link!

Follow us for the official opening date, and be sure to mark your calendars, summer is right around the corner.☀️🍉⛱️

📌602 W. Main St. Jamestown, NC 27282

cityofhighpoint 

#visithighpoint #visithp

events.description:

Introducing atomicroosterhp 🍴From tossed tenders, to crispy chicken sandwiches, there’s something for everyone.

events.title: 🌈 Registration Opens for Summer 2026 Dodgeball Season
events.description:
For the Summer 2026 Dodgeball Season, the Remix is BACK! 💿

When you register for dodgeball, teams will be completely randomized for the season! You can register either as a “free agent” or in a small group up to 3 players to guarantee to some friends to play with. 

Take this opportunity to meet new people, make new friends, recruit players for your regular season team. Remix levels the playing field! 

Registration opens tomorrow!
 LGBTQ & Ally non-profit sports league in Raleigh, NC.

events.title: 🌈 Mhi’ya Queen of Flips at Flex for Raleigh Pride
events.description:
She didn’t come to play… she came to FLIP the whole building 😮‍🔥

Allllllllll the way from RuPauls Drag Race - Mhi’ya Queen of Flips, is taking over Flex for Raleigh Pride and baby… you already know this is about to be a full-on moment. High energy, stunts, hair, drama - all of it! 🏳️‍🌈

We’re kicking things off early, so don’t get cute and show up late thinking you’re gonna squeeze in. Meet & greet at 8 - no presale, so come early and secure your spot. Show at 9, and the party does NOT stop after.

And with Franny Starlight, Marsha Mellows, and Honey Z on the lineup?? Yeah… it’s stacked.

No cover. Just vibes. Just chaos. Just Flex.

See you Thursday, June 25th 😏🔥🏳️‍🌈
 Raleigh's neighborhood gay/straight/whatever bar & club.

events.title: 🎵 Collage Club
events.description:
THIS WEDNESDAY, MAY 20TH:

Join us for Collage Club in the Theater with joseph_rafferty 

Collage Club is a monthly community gathering at The Fruit. Rooted in Surrealism, we use provided materials - substrates (base), scissors, glue sticks, found objects, pre-cut images—to explore visual play, personification, and the subconscious. 

Each session begins with a theme and prompts designed to encourage "creating first and thinking later." All experience levels are welcome to join this creative laboratory where things that look like things become something else entirely!

Collage Club is a creative session lead by our friend and renowned creative mystic, Joseph Rafferty.

All needed materials are included with the session entry fee.

📅 Wed, May 20th
⏰ ️7-9p
🚪Blackbox Theater

events.title: 🎵 MJ: The Essentials — a live dance tribute
events.description:
THIS WEEKEND: rdhproductions presents
MJ: The Essentials — a live dance tribute celebrating the legacy and artistry of Michael Jackson through a chronological showcase of music, dance, and visual storytelling.

Under the creative direction of Romell D. Harris, this is not just a tribute — it’s a reimagined performance experience. Expect signature choreography, powerful storytelling, and a fresh spin on the MJ catalog. From the anthems you love to the most electrifying performance moments, this showcase will honor the legacy while pushing artistic boundaries.

This live performance experience features:
• Timeline-based show (Jackson 5 era → Thriller era → 90s stadium era → Legacy finale)
• Theatrical transitions
• Visual projections
• Live monologues 
• Originally reimagined choreography

It's here for a two-day matinee run with doors opening at 3:30pm both this afternoon and Sunday the 17th.

Show begins at 4pm.
📍Blackbox Theater 

See you tonight!

🔗🌐

events.title: 🎵 Go Figure: Figure Drawing Session
events.description:
NEXT MONDAY 5/4:

Always wanted to try out Figure Drawing? or perhaps you're looking to get back into the practice after some time off? Or.... you don't care too much for drawing but just want to meet local creatives in our natural habit. If any of this resonates with you, you're in luck. 

Go Figure is a drawing group founded to bring community together and make figure drawing accessible. This isn't a class but a chance to try something new out in a safe, supportive environment.

You are welcome to bring whatever drawing supplies you are currently finding inspiration in & ideally a mobile easel if you have one, but please, nothing that makes a mess... 
*ahem* NO dripping, squirting, or splashes. 🎨👨‍🎨 

Doors open at 6:30. Drawing is from 7pm-9pm.
Mature audiences only. 18+ only.

*Absolutely NO photography of the model or the space while the event is active.*

While Michelle loves a dance party, Alyssa brings choreography to the table as one half of A+A Dance Company aandadanceco and co-director and co-producer for RECITAL recital_durham. Vote for this powerhouse team via donation to the Carolina Theatre! Link via carolinatheatredurham 💖

Come support the arts & all the folks dancing!

TODAY, Feb. 17!

🟡 DOWNTOWN WALKING PARADE / SHUFFLE:
~very informal! join & drop, come and go, etc. Not for kids, but kids are welcome with an adult!~

🟢Krewe Name: Tessarae of the Royal Kaleidoscope

1️⃣ 4:45pm: gather at seraphinedurham looking FAB. Our friends at Seraphine will have some drink specials, PLUS crawfish for purchase by the pound!!
2️⃣ 5:15pm ISH: strut along to eatqueenburger for Hurricane cocktails, bobbing for lutrabakery king cake and more festivities
3️⃣ 5:30pm ISH: we'll high tail it up the street to meet at the downtown Durham Bull where to rest of Durham Mardi Gras will be to celebrate before all the parties around town!
4️⃣ 6:30pm ISH: circle back to our friends at killerqueendurhsm for trivia & wine specials
🎉 After, we'll head to queenysdurham / kingfisherdurham for a double decker celebration!

🎭 Fabulousness is encouraged! Find that old feather boa, your sparkliest shirt, the snazziest suit, and/or your favorite accessory. 🎉

🟡QUEENY's: party (no cover) from 8-12pm with 99brassband starting at 8:30pm, rice & beans, cocktails, king cake & dancing!

🟣KINGFISHER: speakeasy New Orleans jazz vibes (electric organ trio!) with mark.wells.music (no cover) & a specialty Mardi Gras cocktail menu. Celebratory vibes, but laid back groovy.

events.title: 🌈 Kingfisher Speakeasy Jazz
events.description:
Parade! Party! Deets from some familiar faces PLUS more below ⬇️ 

Fat Tuesday, Feb. 17!

🟡 DOWNTOWN WALKING PARADE / SHUFFLE:
~very informal! Join & drop, come and go, etc. Kids can attend but not a kid event (earlier is best for kiddos prob)~

🟢Krewe Name: Tessarae of the Royal Kaleidoscope
🟢MORE on parade theme at bottom!

1️⃣ 4:45pm: gather at seraphinedurham in fabulous attire and costume, they'll have some drink special! We'll have crafted kaleidoscopes & beads to share
2️⃣ 5:15pm ISH: strut along to eatqueenburger for Hurricane cocktails, bobbing for lutrabakery king cake and more festivities
3️⃣ 5:30pm ISH: we'll high tail it up the street to meet at the downtown Durham Bull where to rest of Durham Mardi Gras will be to celebrate before all the parties around town!
4️⃣ 6:30pm ISH: circle back to our friends at killerqueendurhsm for trivia & wine specials 
🎉 After, we'll head to queenysdurham / kingfisherdurham for a double decker celebration! 

🎭 Fabulousness is encouraged! Find that old feather boa, your sparkliest shirt, the snazziest suit, and/or your favorite accessory. 🎉

🟡QUEENY's: party (no cover) from 8-12pm with 99brassband starting at 8:30pm, rice & beans, cocktails, king cake & dancing!

🟣KINGFISHER: speakeasy New Orleans jazz vibes (electric organ trio!) with mark.wells.music (no cover) & a specialty Mardi Gras cocktail menu. Celebratory vibes, but laid back groovy.

🟢PARADE THEME:
•Krewe Name: Tessarae of the Royal Kaleidoscope
•Abbreviated TRK– krewe members are “TRricKsters”
•Inspo for the name: A Kaleidoscope is both the multicolored tube shaped toy and the name of a group of Monarch butterflies. And our restaurants included monarch-themed names and "colorful" variety. Tessarae is the name of the little pieces of colored glass making up the shapes in the kaleidoscope.
•Theme for Parade: “Durham, City Of Medi-SIN”
•The vision: rowdy, roaming merriment through the streets of downtown Durham that ends at the official Mardi Gras Party at Queeny’s. Spreading the spirit of Mardi Gras with hand made throws and beads, costumes, and music. Inviting all bystanders to join in or meet us later.

events.org: Chapel Hill Arts - Small Town Pride
events.description:

events.title: 🌈 Carrboro's Pride Piper Walk
events.org: Chapel Hill Arts - Small Town Pride
events.description:
Happy #PrideMonth, y’all! 🌈

#SmallTownPride is in full swing across Chapel Hill and Carrboro this June. Join us for these celebrations:

🏳️‍🌈 Saturday, June 6 (12–3 pm): Chapel Hill Pride Promenade

🏳️‍🌈 Friday, June 26 (4:30 pm): Carrboro’s Pride Piper Walk

🏳️‍🌈 Friday, June 26 (5–9 pm): Carrboro Pride Dance Party / Fiesta del Orgullo de Carrboro

And don’t miss these Pride art installations:

✨ New temporary piece by morrowdowdle and maxdowdle, called "Shelter for the Coming Out," installing in downtown Chapel Hill this week

✨ irisgottlieb's 2024 art bus, "Queer Leaders of Chapel Hill," is still rolling around Town — catch it up close at the Pride Promenade!

🔗 #LinkInBio (Small Town Pride)

events.title: 🌈 Gond-Inspired Art Exhibition by Sampada Kodagali Agarwal
events.org: Chapel Hill Arts - Small Town Pride
events.description:
Intricate pattern and storytelling collide in our newest exhibition by Sampada Kodagali Agarwal (ansimit.sampada).

“This exhibition brings together the timeless wisdom of Aesop’s Fables and beloved children’s animal stories, reimagined through the intricate visual language of Gond-inspired art,” Sampada says. “Rooted in the indigenous traditions of central India, Gond art is known for its rhythmic lines, detailed patterns, and deep connection to nature and storytelling.”

Come visit (it’s free!):
🔸 On display until July 9
🔸 Located at chapelhillpubliclibrary
🔸 Mon-Thurs: 10am-8pm, Fri-Sun: 10am-6pm
 Month-long Pride celebration hosted by Chapel Hill Community Arts & Culture.

events.title: 🌈 Chapel Hill-Carrboro Juneteenth Celebration
events.org: Chapel Hill Arts - Small Town Pride
events.description:
One month until the annual Chapel Hill-Carrboro Juneteenth Celebration!

On Friday, June 19 from 4–8pm, come to Hargraves Community Center to enjoy live music and line dancing, shop local vendors and food trucks, and celebrate Juneteenth with your neighbors.

Juneteenth, also known as Emancipation Day, commemorates the emancipation of enslaved people in the United States. The Towns of Chapel Hill and Carrboro proclaimed the observance and commemoration of Juneteenth on June 19, 2020 and encourage residents and employers to recognize the holiday.

🔗 #LinkInBio (Festivals & Events)

Hosted by chapelhillarts and townofcarrboro

📸 Mark Losey
 Month-long Pride celebration hosted by Chapel Hill Community Arts & Culture.

events.title: 🌈 Artist Call Application Deadline for Public Spaces Exhibitions
events.org: Chapel Hill Arts - Small Town Pride
events.description:
Artist call! 🖼️ It’s time for our next round of individual and group exhibitions at chapelhillpubliclibrary and chapelhillgov Town Hall.

We seek vibrant, high-quality artwork in a variety of media by a wide range of local artists. Whether this is your first or 50th exhibit, we welcome you to apply and share your work with our community. 

Public Spaces is an indoor exhibition series in Chapel Hill. Exhibits rotate every two months and are free for the public to visit. Swipe ➡️ to see some of our recent artists and curators.

What’s in it for you?
👉 $300 stipend for lead artist/curator
👉 Two-month exhibition
👉 Your work on display at a high-traffic exhibition space in Chapel Hill
👉 Artwork may be for sale — we take no commission!

Eligibility: Triangle-area artists, artist collectives, and curators ages 18+, who create original art that can be hung on walls indoors

Apply by Monday, June 8 at 5pm
🔗 #LinkInBio (Applications)
 Month-long Pride celebration hosted by Chapel Hill Community Arts & Culture.

events.title: 🌈 The Living Lineage
events.org: Chapel Hill Arts - Small Town Pride
events.description:
Step inside “The Living Lineage,” our newest Public Spaces exhibition at Chapel Hill Town Hall.
 
This group show from artist.ummah brings together seven artists devoted to the disciplined study of the classical Muslim arts.
 
“Together, these Muslim-American artists draw from a rich artistic inheritance to cultivate education and understanding, inviting broader audiences into a living tradition that builds bridges between art, identity, and community.”
 
Come visit (it’s free!):
🔹 On display until June 11
🔹 405 MLK Jr. Blvd, Chapel Hill, NC
🔹 Hours: Mon-Fri, 8:30am-5pm
 Month-long Pride celebration hosted by Chapel Hill Community Arts & Culture.

events.title: 🌈 Call for Artists: Library Card Design Submission
events.org: Chapel Hill Arts - Small Town Pride
events.description:
Call for pocket-sized art! 📚 To kick off #NationalLibraryWeek, chapelhillpubliclibrary is looking for a Triangle-based artist to create original artwork for a limited-edition library card.

The chosen design will be printed on 5,000 wallet-sized library cards and 1,000 vinyl stickers (both sized at 3.5×2.25in).

The design is open to artistic interpretation and may include…
📖 The Library’s Mission: “Sparking Curiosity. Inspiring Learning. Creating Connections.”
📖 Library programs, services, collections, and the joy of reading
📖 The Library's architectural elements and surrounding landscape
📖 An abstract or more representational design that works well at this relatively small size

What’s in it for you?
👉 Chosen finalists: $100/artist
👉 Selected artist: $500 and your work in the hands of thousands in Orange County

Eligibility: Artists 18+, who live within 40 miles of Chapel Hill

Apply by Monday, May 18 at 5pm
🔗 #LinkInBio (Applications)
 Month-long Pride celebration hosted by Chapel Hill Community Arts & Culture.

events.title: 🌈 Exhibition by Voon Wong
events.org: Chapel Hill Arts - Small Town Pride
events.description:
Have you seen our latest exhibition by Voon Wong (artvw)? 

Exploring everyday interactions and drawing from his own personal experiences, Voon’s watercolors are rooted in memory, culture, and humanity. 
 
Voon discovered his passion for art in high school and studied at an art college in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, before earning a master’s degree from academy_of_art. His early watercolor paintings feature serene landscapes and local fishing boats, reflecting his connection to coastal life. Today, he focuses on capturing human experiences. In 2025, he was honored with Signature Member status in both the nwsgallery and the watercolorsocietync.
 
Come visit (it’s free!):
🔸 On display until May 7
🔸 Located at chapelhillpubliclibrary
🔸 Mon-Thurs: 10am-8pm, Fri-Sun: 10am-6pm
 Month-long Pride celebration hosted by Chapel Hill Community Arts & Culture.

events.title: 🌈 Faces of the Forest Kickoff Event
events.org: Chapel Hill Arts - Small Town Pride
events.description:
It's officially spring! What better time to get outside and explore public art?

"Faces of the Forest" is a brand-new outdoor art installation at Pritchard Park by Levi Yakubu (yakubupottery), a fifth-generation Nigerian potter.

We're celebrating this addition to Chapel Hill's permanent art collection tomorrow, March 21 with a kickoff event from 1-3pm at chapelhillpubliclibrary:

🌳 Artist talk at 1pm & live clay demos by Levi Yakubu
🌲 Staff‑led & self‑guided walks to see the artwork
🌳 Poetry performance by Chapel Hill Poet Laureate Donovan Livingston (dlive87)
🌲 Interactive clay station with the Community Clay Studio team

🔗 #LinkInBio (Festivals & Events)
 Month-long Pride celebration hosted by Chapel Hill Community Arts & Culture.

events.title: 🌈 Beyond the Surface
events.org: Chapel Hill Arts - Small Town Pride
events.location: Chapel Hill Town Hall, 405 MLK Jr. Blvd, Chapel Hill, NC
events.description:
What are dreams and what do they mean? How do emotions shape our lives?
 
These are questions that artist brook.ramsey tries to answer in the latest exhibition at chapelhillgov Town Hall, called “Beyond the Surface.”
 
“This series is a story about how our lives are transformed by what we choose to take away from our experiences,” Brook says. “It is also about the transformative power that honoring our emotions has in our lives.”
 
Come visit (it’s free!):
🔹 On display until April 9
🔹 405 MLK Jr. Blvd, Chapel Hill, NC
🔹 Hours: Mon-Fri, 8:30am-5pm
 Month-long Pride celebration hosted by Chapel Hill Community Arts & Culture.

events.title: 🌈 Application Deadline for Mural Project
events.org: Chapel Hill Arts - Small Town Pride
events.location: Chapel Hill Community Center, 120 South Estes Drive
events.description:
Call for artists! 🎨 We’re looking for a Triangle-based artist or team to create murals on two exterior walls at the entrance of the newly-landscaped Chapel Hill Community Center at 120 South Estes Drive.

Mural design is open to artistic interpretation and may address…
✨ chapelhillparks' themes of Inspire, Create, Preserve
🛝 Activities and patrons of the Center
🌳 Surrounding parkland; and/or other concepts

The murals could be realistic or more abstract, and the project should involve opportunities for community input or involvement.

What’s in it for you?
👉 Chosen finalists: $750/artist or team
👉 Selected artist/team: $24,000 and your work on display at a high-traffic Town facility used for recreation and community gatherings

Eligibility: Artists and/or teams who are 18+, live within 40 miles of Chapel Hill, and possess General Liability Insurance

Apply by Tuesday, March 31 at 5pm
🔗 #LinkInBio (Applications)
 Month-long Pride celebration hosted by Chapel Hill Community Arts & Culture.

events.title: 🎵 Bear Ghost
events.description:
NOW ON SALE! BEAR GHOST - Sat Oct 3 @ MOTORCO

with SARAH & THE SAFE WORD / SPACEMAN BOB

GET TIX @ motorcomusic.com/event/bear-ghost

andmoreagainpresents 

"BIOS ARE FOR THE WEAK!" Bear Ghost cried as they meekly tapped out a Spotify bio, pausing every minute or so to recover from a productive sob. Productive in the sense of how many fluid ounces of mucin, glucose, sodium, etc. they produced, but little else. Their fingers pruned to the bone from the tears veiling the keyboard they feverishly clicked away at.

The room was dim. An overhead light flickered and danced to an eclectic rhythm of a song that had not yet been written. But would be written. By Bear Ghost, probably.

"Why must you torture yourselves?" mewled their manager, fearing for their sanity as they neared day 11 without sleep. His fingers pruned to the bone from his fondest hobby: sundrying plums with his bare hands.

Bear Ghost rose to their feet, eyes swollen. They looked calm now. Resigned but resolute. "How else will they know?" they pleaded, faltering as their knees begged to give way. "How else will they know that Bear Ghost is an Adventure Rock band that fuses fun and quirky musicianship with complex melodies, phat harmonies, heavy riffitude, and pop structure to deliver a sound purposely crafted to fill all booties, tall and small, with righteous boogie?"

The room was still, but undeniably changed. The air somehow tingling. Light and effervescent with the anticipation of something new, something fresh, something that could maybe, just maybe, save the whole wide world.

"You did it," choked their stunned manager. "I'll get the president on the phone."

events.title: 🎵 Robert Lester Folsom
events.description:
NOW ON SALE! ROBERT LESTER FOLSOM - Wed Oct 7 @ MOTORCO

GET TIX @ motorcomusic.com/event/robert-lester-folsom

catscradlenc Presents

Unlike similar iconoclasts with crystal vision who held forth with the oppressive thumb of a musical dictator, Folsom was ever in service of song, standing equally aside his collaborators, which uniformly engendered affinity and respect lasting to this day. While a tick higher than the second-tier, the mountaintop was always narrowly out his grasp. Though, with the right set of opportunities, bolstered by talent and drive, Folsom, if not as a stand-alone, star-quality artist, could have led the career of any number of songwriters behind the curtain who rode the magical musical continuum across the decades with faceless success. Perhaps it was Robert and company’s playing “weird spacey stuff and ballads,” as guitarist VanBrackle describes, in small town Georgia skating rinks, bowling alleys, and school dances expecting Top 40 dance-ready hits which held them down. Perhaps it was simply location. Though, the music of Sunshine Only Sometimes is composed of an intrinsic ability to hear the music truly playing, as opposed to the space in air heard by the lay-ear, which places Folsom’s music in a timeless space primed for perennial (re)discovery.

events.description:
NOW ON SALE! TOKYO TEA ROOM - Sat Oct 10 @ MOTORCO

GET TIX @ motorcomusic.com/event/tokyo-tea-room

Tokyo Tea Room are a band from Margate, UK, who strive to create music inspired by human emotions, exploring themes of longing and the ephemeral nature of existence. With a warm, hypnotic sound shaped by introspective songwriting and production from Daniel James Elliott, the project carries a distinct and immersive sonic identity. Tokyo Tea Room is a timeless project whose message transcends the music itself, arousing passions and emotions and taking listeners on a journey within a tender, comforting bubble.

Their debut album No Rush established them as one of the most compelling emerging acts in alternative music, resonating with a growing global audience. With millions of monthly listeners and a sold-out debut North American tour, the band are quickly building momentum - particularly in the US, where their audience continues to expand.

With new music on the horizon, Tokyo Tea Room are entering a defining new chapter, evolving their sound while staying rooted in the emotional depth that defines their work.

events.title: 🎵 Chanel Beads
events.description:
NOW ON SALE! CHANEL BEADS - Sun Oct 11 @ MOTORCO

GET TIX @ motorcomusic.com/event/chanel-beads

with MECHATOK / CAR CULTURE

Chanel Beads — the project of New York-based musician Shane Lavers — announces his debut album, Your Day Will Come (out 4/19 on Jagjaguwar), and shares the lead single/video, “Idea June.” Your Day Will Come marks Lavers’ arrival as a new force in experimental music. Throughout the album, Lavers captures the many contradictions of modern existence and the strange infiniteness of the digital world. Though he incorporates the scrappy sonics of post-punk, the gripping sentimentality of pop tunes, and the spectral artifice of electronic music, he blurs lines through unconventional song structures that build into transcendental climaxes. As he intentionally prints his songs down to embed fried artifacts and ghostly remains, the resulting songs have a time-collapsing quality, both transitory and timeless.

andmoreagainpresents

events.title: 🎵 feeble little horse
events.description:
NOW ON SALE! feeble little horse - Sun Jul 12 @ MOTORCO

GET TIX @ motorcomusic.com/event/feeble-little-horse

feeble little horse is naturally delighted to present their third full-length LP, bitknot. The album was written, arranged, produced, and recorded by Sebastian Kinsler, Lydia Slocum, and Jake Kelley across their respective homes in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania.

A spirited investigation into the unnatural space created between human nature and a culture of convenience, a synthesis of dirt and digital, bitknot by feeble little horse creates a language wherein one can re-imbue a sanctity of interdependence away from consumptive “self-sufficiency” and materialism. “The album art is based on the coincidental core memory matrix, which was used in old computers to store memory / access information using 0s and 1s. Each core, or ‘bit,’ is accessed through the grid of wires, like a knot that stores secret details and memories.” bitknot asks that we find new modes of being through this grid, entrusting one another with the collaborative construction of these knots. This negotiation with an ever-developing hybrid reality is expertly exemplified in the album’s production — the buoyancy of Kinsler’s arrangements provide a perfectly balanced surface tension for the weight of Slocum’s meandering introspection as they playfully harmonize against saccharine hooks, walls of noise, a supercharged car battery’s worth of synths and samples dropped in the ocean of their guitar-driven songwriting framework, and some of Kelley’s most laser-focused drums to date to create a sonic chimera that is as likely to be found nascently developing in the early aughts as some unknown, chromatic future.

Rhymes written with sidewalk chalk that refuse to be erased in the Anthropocene’s acid rain of destructive relationships, Herbert Marcuse’s One-Dimensional Man manifest through the spirit of a young woman born in the shadow of the Steel City’s industrial ghosts, a study of the clumsy alchemy of IRL and WWW — it is within these rhizomatic contradictions that bitknot proliferates.

andmoreagainpresents

Anthony Green is a renowned vocalist and songwriter best known as the frontman of Circa Survive and the original singer of Saosin. In addition to his band work, Green has built a prolific solo career, releasing acclaimed albums such as Avalon, Beautiful Things, Pixie Queen, and Boom. Done. that highlight his wide-ranging songwriting and distinctive voice outside the group format. He is also a member of The Sound of Animals Fighting as well as L.S. Dunes which features members of My Chemical Romance, Coheed and Cambria, and Thursday. With a catalog spanning two decades, Green remains one of the most recognizable and enduring figures in modern alternative music.

events.title: 🎵 CAROLINE
events.description:
NOW ON SALE! CAROLINE - Sat Nov 21 @ MOTORCO

GET TIX @ motorcomusic.com/event/caroline

andmoreagainpresents 

Returning with 'caroline 2', the eight-piece collective embrace a bolder, more expansive sound. Going beyond their debut's explorations of repetition, slowness and space, the new album pushes further into dynamic contrasts — organic and electronic, raw and refined. Launched with the striking single ‘Tell me I never knew that’, featuring Caroline Polachek’s unmistakable vocals, caroline 2 showcases a fearless interplay of layered instrumentation, warped vocal processing, and moments of both euphoria and melancholy. Intentional and immersive, this next chapter solidifies caroline as one of the most innovative voices in contemporary music.
